rationale: Educ. Code §12.154 governs charter school application content criteria for public senior colleges and junior colleges. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: the commissioner may grant a charter under this subchapter to a public senior college or university only if the following criteria are satisfied in the public senior college's or university's application, as determined by the commissioner:
_note: No conflict. Rule text concerns charter school authorization criteria; proposed change concerns homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). No overlap in subject matter.
